keyword: automatic cat feeder for wet food refrigerated
title: Automatic Cat Feeder for Wet Food (Refrigerated Options)
meta: Feeders that keep wet food cold and serve it on a schedule — for cats on a wet-food diet.
intro: Wet food spoils fast, so a refrigerated feeder is the only safe auto-option. They're pricier but solve a real problem.

sections.body: Unrefrigerated wet food grows bacteria in hours. A cooled compartment is essential.
Most use pre-filled cups on a timer; you load several days ahead.
These need constant power; a backup matters more than with dry feeders.

products.name: Refrigerated Wet Food Cat Feeder
products.asin_query: refrigerated automatic cat feeder wet food
products.blurb: Keeps food cold, serves on schedule.

products.name: Timed Wet Food Feeder 3 Meal
products.asin_query: 3 meal wet food cat feeder timer

products.name: Cat Wet Food Feeder Tray
products.asin_query: wet food cat feeder tray timer

faq.q: How long does food stay safe?
faq.a: Refrigerated units: days. Ice-pack trays: ~4-8h — not overnight in heat.

faq.q: Can I use pate and chunks?
faq.a: Both work if the cup fits; chunkier needs a wider opening.
